goal: 实现 agent-capsule v0.1：本地 ZIP Capsule 共享到 Codex UI，并直接提交推送到 main

summary.title: 实现 agent-capsule v0.1 本地 ZIP Capsule
summary.what: 启用 Mainline，并新增 capsule Go CLI，支持将单个 Codex thread 导出为标准 .capsule.zip，检查包内容，dry-run/execute 恢复到目标 Codex home，并验证 session 文件、session_index.jsonl、state_5.sqlite 三层状态。
summary.why: 用户希望先做 v0.1 文件分享：发送一个普通 zip 形态的 capsule 给别人，对方的 Codex agent 即使未安装工具也能读根目录说明，再安装/运行 CLI，把 session 恢复到自己的 Codex UI。
summary.user_goal: 实现 agent-capsule v0.1：本地 ZIP Capsule 共享到 Codex UI，并直接提交推送到 main

decisions.chose: 默认导出标准 zip，文件名后缀为 .capsule.zip，根目录包含 AGENT_README.md。
decisions.rationale: 接收方和 agent 可以用普通 zip 工具识别和读取，同时保留 capsule 语义。

decisions.chose: 恢复时写入 session jsonl、session_index.jsonl、state_5.sqlite threads 三层，并重写目标 cwd。
decisions.rationale: Codex UI 可见性依赖三层状态一致，单独复制 transcript 不够。

decisions.chose: restore 默认 dry-run，真实写入必须传 --execute；同 id 冲突默认拒绝，--replace 才覆盖，并在写入前备份目标状态。
decisions.rationale: 恢复过程会修改接收方本地 Codex 历史，需要明确执行和可回退证据。

decisions.chose: 按目标 sqlite 的 PRAGMA table_info 做列交集 upsert，并保留当前 Codex 新字段。
decisions.rationale: Codex 的 threads schema 会演进，导入器不能硬编码旧字段后丢掉 model、reasoning_effort、preview 等信息。

rejected.alternative: v0.1 做链接、云服务、沙盒或跨 agent runtime 适配
rejected.reason: 用户明确要求先做本地文件共享，后续能力不进入 v0.1。

review_notes: dogfood 已跑：真实 Codex thread 导出 .capsule.zip、inspect、dry-run restore、execute restore、verify，临时 Codex home 三层状态均通过。
secret scan 默认会阻断高置信 secret；一个历史规划 thread 被扫描拦截，未使用 --unsafe 导出。
v0.1 不迁移 auth/provider 凭据，也不承诺 encrypted_content 在别人机器上密码学等价继续。

architectural_claims: capsule CLI is a local-first Go command with export, inspect, restore, and verify subcommands.
.capsule.zip is a standard zip container with manifest, root agent readme, Codex payloads, restore notes, safety scan, and checksums.
Codex UI restoration is modeled as synchronization of session jsonl, session_index.jsonl, and state_5.sqlite threads.
behavioral_changes: capsule export writes one Codex thread into a .capsule.zip file and blocks by default when high-confidence secrets are detected.
capsule inspect verifies zip structure and sha256 checksums and prints manifest and safety data.
capsule restore plans writes by default and requires --execute for mutation; it refuses existing same-id state unless --replace is set.
capsule verify checks restored session file, index entry, sqlite row, and cwd consistency.

data_model_changes.name: Agent Capsule zip schema v1
data_model_changes.location: .capsule.zip files: manifest.json, AGENT_README.md, codex/session.jsonl, codex/index-entry.json, codex/thread-row.json, agent/restore.md, safety/scan.json, checksums.json
data_model_changes.migration_notes: New artifact format only; no existing repository data migration.

data_model_changes.name: local Codex home restore state
data_model_changes.location: target CODEX_HOME sessions/, session_index.jsonl, state_5.sqlite threads
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Restore writes only when --execute is provided and backs up target files first.

security_implications: Export scans session content for high-confidence secret/token patterns and blocks by default on findings.
Restore mutates local Codex history only with --execute and creates backups before writing.
The tool intentionally does not migrate auth.json, provider credentials, access tokens, or cloud state.
migration_notes: Mainline was initialized in this repository before implementation and committed as mainline: init.
No Go make test was run; verification used go test ./... and go vet ./... per workspace instruction.
